results.title: WI vs SL 1st Test: Kemar Roach joins West Indies legends as hosts script record win over Sri Lanka
results.description: Kemar Roach achieved a monumental career milestone, becoming the fifth West Indies bowler to claim 300 Test wickets during a crushing innings-and-217-run victory over Sri Lanka. This dominant win, one of the Caribbean's largest ever, was set up by a world-record 401-run partnership between Amir Jangoo and Roston Chase.

results.title: Kidambi Srikanth's First Final in Seven Months Ends in Heartbreak at US Open
results.description: Kidambi Srikanth's impressive run at the US Open ended in another runner-up finish as China's Su Li Yang outclassed the Indian in the men's singles final.

results.title: KPMG’s playbook for building world-class sports fan experiences in Saudi Arabia
results.description: With Saudi Arabia on the cusp of hosting a series of major international sporting events – including the AFC Asian Cup 2027 and FIFA World Cup 2034 – attention is turning to how the Kingdom will deliver on its ambition to become a world-class host.
